solarGain

Solar heat gain · the attic vs the outside air, three measured days
What a ridge vent would do
attic, measuredwith venting (modeled)
Peak −11.1°F · 9 PM attic 83 → 73°F
What R-38 insulation would do
bathroom, measuredat R-38 (modeled)
Room peak 88 → 78°F on the same day
+29°F
hottest the attic ran above the outside air
1h 40m
attic peak lags the sunshine peak, then radiates all evening
78 kWh
of AC in three days, 72% while the panels produced
Scenario curves: Tuesday replayed through this house's own fitted thermal model (dotted blue = outdoor). Built on Home Assistant history.
